sourceMovie.title: Black Panther
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Black Panther (2018) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Avengers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Black Panther clicked for you, The Avengers (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Avengers: Infinity War
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Black Panther clicked for you, Avengers: Infinity War (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Black Panther?
faq.answer: Try The Avengers, Avengers: Infinity War, Guardians of the Galaxy—each shares DNA with Black Panther while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Black Panther?
faq.answer: Black Panther (2018) is best described as Action, Adventure, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Black Panther part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Black Panther Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
